scope: B1 module-gap coverage for production modules without dedicated test_*.py (per tests-expand.md U1-U22 backlog after Wave 3 W3A landed 8 modules).

U4.notes: Binary / multiclass / multilabel / regression branches of compute_label_distribution_drift + format_drift_report. Covers no-drift, 50/50->90/10 prior shift biz value, 5-sigma regression mean shift, edge cases (train None, empty test, no target_name).

U5.notes: translate_sklearn_mlp_overrides_to_mlframe_mlp_kwargs + recurrent_config_kwargs translators (alpha->weight_decay, hidden_layer_sizes->network_params, identity-collapse), compute_feature_distribution_drift z-score with FI-weighted score check, compute_categorical_drift_psi with new-category contribution.

U6.notes: Predicate parametrization across all canonical names in LINEAR/TREE/NEURAL_MODEL_TYPES, case insensitivity, set disjointness invariant, create_linear_model factory across 7 regressor classes + unknown-type raise + classifier path + R^2 >= 0.9 smoke fit.

U7.notes: clean_mlframe_model strip-fields invariant (covers full _LEAN_STRIP_FIELDS frozenset + preserve survivors + in-place return), validate_load_meta_sidecar None on missing/corrupt/non-object, matching versions returns payload, drift WARNs by default, strict=True raises, missing live library flagged.

U8.notes: bayesian_alpha_fit_bootstrap dict shape, seed determinism (alpha+beta samples bit-identical), n_bootstrap=1 NaN std edge, CI containment on well-specified DGP (alpha=2.5 beta=-1.0 n=2000), n<4 degenerate fallback, subsample_n cap, ci_level widening monotonic in level.

U9.notes: reset/record/snapshot aggregation by name, sorted-by-total-desc invariant, ram_delta accumulation + abs-magnitude sorting, format_phase_summary empty / top-N truncation / value rendering, phase() context manager duration + exception path + nested separately + WARN on exception + thread safety (4x distinct + 4x same-name).

U10.notes: Capability gate: True on supported lgb build, False when _LGB_AVAILABLE flag flipped, False when set_label or set_weight missing (monkeypatched Dataset stubs), idempotent repeated calls.

U11.notes: Mirror of U10 for xgb.QuantileDMatrix capability probe.

U12.notes: qid_to_group_sizes (basic, empty, single query, singleton queries, n-rows invariant, np.unique parity); prepare_cb/xgb/lgb_inputs sorted-passthrough vs unsorted-resort + cross-backend row-count + group-size parity; ValueError on length mismatch / empty.

U21.notes: get_preset_kwargs across minimal/standard/physics: documented dict shape, non-empty lists, all values are str, complexity dict positive ints, nested_constraints structure, extra_sympy_mappings covers all 7 OPERATOR_JULIA_SIGNATURES + is callable, unknown preset raises ValueError, minimal subset of standard binary ops, physics includes trig, safe_log/safe_sqrt Piecewise correctness pinned.

modules_dropped_from_scope.reason: Already well-covered by 520-LOC test_pu_learning_synthetic.py per tests-expand.md U13 verdict; no gap identified during this pass.

Per tests-expand.md U22 verdict: internal _emit_* helpers (all leading-underscore -> strictly NOT public API per the brief's no-underscore rule); already covered indirectly by test_timeseries_emit_module_split.py re-export sensor. Confirmed CLOSED in audit; no new file needed.

cprofile_status: SKIP: all modules in scope are non-perf-critical helper / gate / report functions (predicates, version probes, registry helpers, sidecar JSON IO, drift formula computation). Perf-critical kernels live elsewhere (filters/info_theory, transformer/_kernels_njit, etc.) and are out of B1 scope per tests-expand.md guidance.
